description.en: Revered as the 'Goddess of the Yangtze,' this deeply tragic, almost-blind river dolphin was driven to entirely functional extinction by massive industrialization.
description.zh: 被尊称为「长江女神」的、一只拥有深深悲惨命运的几乎全盲的淡水豚，因空前规模的大规模工业化而被彻底逼向了完全的功能性灭绝。

anatomy.en: The Baiji was an exquisitely unique freshwater dolphin, stretching up to 2.5 meters (8.2 ft) and weighing 160 kg. It featured a striking pale blue-grey upper body and a pure white belly, earning its famed Chinese name 'white-finned dolphin'. Having evolved for ancient millions of years in a heavily sediment-filled, incredibly murky river, its eyes had drastically degenerated to the size of tiny pinholes, rendering it almost totally blind. To compensate, it possessed a dramatically elongated, upward-curving beak resembling a sword, and possessed a highly immense, melon-shaped forehead housing an astonishingly sophisticated, extremely high-frequency sonar echolocation system.
anatomy.zh: 白鳍豚曾是一种精致而独特的纯淡水豚类，体长可达2.5米，重约160公斤。它拥有引人注目的浅蓝灰色上半身和纯洁雪白的腹部，这也是其著名的中文名字「白鳍」的由来。由于在泥沙严重、水质浑浊的长江中经过了漫长的进化，它的眼睛已经退化到针孔般大小，几乎完全失明。为了弥补视力的不足，它进化出了一个细长且向上微微弯曲、形似利剑的长吻，并拥有一个呈甜瓜状的饱满额头，里面装载着一套先进且高度灵敏的极高频声纳回声定位系统。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Because it could not effectively see, the Baiji relied solely and absolutely entirely on its highly tuned acoustic sonar to 'visualize' its incredibly murky underwater world, communicate with its pod, and expertly hunt bottom-dwelling riverbed fish on dark nights. Tragically, this exact evolutionary masterpiece became its ultimate, inescapable doom. When the mighty Yangtze quickly exploded into an incredibly massive industrial shipping superhighway, the non-stop, deafening underwater cacophony generated by thousands of motorized boat propellers severely damaged and irreparably blinded their acoustic sonar. Overwhelmed, confused, continuously struck cleanly by massive ship propellers, hopelessly entangled in rolling deadly fishing nets, and severely poisoned by pollution, their incredibly peaceful society was entirely dismantled.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 因为无法进行有效的视觉观察，白鳍豚完全依赖于其高度敏锐的声纳来对其浑浊无光的水下世界进行「可视化」，与族群交流，并在黑夜中精准猎杀栖息在底层的鱼类。令人悲痛的是，这件在漫长进化中造就的完美武器，最终变成了导致其生存毁灭的直接原因。当长江迅速转变为一条极其繁忙的现代工业航运高速公路时，成千上万艘船舶螺旋桨产生的不间断、震耳欲聋的水下噪音，严重破坏并彻底致盲了它们的声纳系统。在声纳被剥夺的绝望和不知所措中，它们失去了方向，频繁被巨大的船舶螺旋桨无情斩断，或被致命的滚钩和迷魂阵渔网死死缠住而淹死。加上严重的工业污染，它们原本和平的古代河神社会最终被历史彻底粉碎。

habitat_and_distribution.en: This precious species was found absolutely nowhere else on Earth. It was completely, entirely confined exclusively to only the middle and lower reaches of the massive Yangtze River system in China, swimming from intensely populated industrial hubs like Yichang, relentlessly down past Wuhan, eventually extending aggressively into attached giant water basins like brutally overfished Dongting Lake and Poyang Lake, before terminating precisely at the mouth of the Yangtze estuary in severely polluted completely industrialized Shanghai. Officially declared functionally extinct after an exhausting absolutely massive multi-national river expedition in 2006 found zero individuals, it heartbreakingly represents the first documented global extinction of a cetacean highly directly driven fundamentally completely by human industrial impact.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 这是一个令人深感遗憾的、地球上其他任何地方都无法找到的中国特有古老物种。它生前严格分布在巨大的长江水系中下游主干河道内，从人口密集的工业枢纽宜昌市起，顺流而下穿过繁华的武汉，有时还会延伸进入受到过度捕捞和污染威胁的洞庭湖与鄱阳湖等大型附属湖泊中寻找避难所，最终止于重度工业化的上海长江入海口。2006年，一场耗费多国顶尖专家心血、几乎地毯式搜索的大规模长江联合科考，最终痛苦地宣告未能发现哪怕一只存活的白鳍豚个体。随后它被科学界无奈而无情地正式宣布为「功能性灭绝」。这令人心碎的悲剧，代表了有明确记录以来，第一起完全由人类工业活动直接驱使并引发的鲸类动物灭绝事件。

habitat.text_en: Endemic to the Yangtze River Mainstem
habitat.text_zh: 长江中下游干流及附属湖泊
